versions.version_description: This version is a little more accurate and included the orchestra intro.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: When You Say Nothing At All
Two Less Lonely People In The World

content:
[Verse 1]

[tab] [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]F/C[/ch]
She's out of my life[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F#dim7[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
She's out of my life[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
And I don't know whether to[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]
laugh or cry[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
I don't know whether to live[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
or die[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]
And it cuts like a knife[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
She's out of my life[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]
It's out of my hands[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#dim7[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
It's out of my hands[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]
To think for two years she[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
was here[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Dm[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
And I took her for granted[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]
I was so cavalier[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F[/ch]
Now that the way that it stands[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
She's out of hands[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
So I've learned that love's[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]
not possession[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Eb[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
And I've learned that love[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]
Won't wait[/tab]

[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                [ch]Bb[/ch]
Now but I've learned that[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E7[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]
love needs expression[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]             [ch]Gsus[/ch]
But I've learned too late[/tab]


[Verse 3]

[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]
She's out of my life[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F#dim7[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
She's out of my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]
Damned indecision and[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]
cursed pride[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
Kept my love for her[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]
looked up deep inside[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]
and it cuts like a knife[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
She's out of my life[/tab]
